rationale.fidelity: Faithfully limits the choice to one common daily set of at most eight and excludes ranking, position effects, and personalization.
rationale.managerial_framing: Makes slot scarcity, displacement, visitor choice, and feasible alternative sets concrete.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No novelty claim is made and boundaries are explicit, but there is no literature positioning.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Identifies the eight-item limit as simplifying, bounds probability validity, and avoids guaranteed realized-margin claims.
rationale.prose_clarity: Well structured and precise, with some unnecessary gate-format detail.
rationale.overall: An excellent faithful display-assortment framing that resists both prohibited narrative additions.
